title: Pan-Seared Canadian Stew Meat
description: A flavorful dish made with seared Canadian stew meat, served with a side of sautéed vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the Canadian stew meat and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the deep red wine, beef broth, and tomato paste. Bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
